content:
# Kern Analysis

**Summary**: A mathematical method to calculate interval velocity from stacking velocities.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[2018-abdulrahman|Abdulrahman, 2018]] used Dix formula to calculate the interval velocity of Biyadh.

## Scientific Context

- [[2018-abdulrahman|Abdulrahman, 2018]] Essential for determining the true velocity of a layer when only stacked data is available.

## Measurement and Characterization Methods

- [[2018-abdulrahman|Abdulrahman, 2018]] Applied to stacking velocities from both long and short offset cases.

## Key Findings Across Sources

- Calculated interval velocities using the Dix formula were clustered around 4000 m/s, close to the model value of 4045 m/s. ([[2018-abdulrahman|Abdulrahman, 2018, p. 48]])
